deltaVsEarlier.now10h53: Grande Anse d'Arlet 69/100 MOYEN (4-way tie at 69)
deltaVsEarlier.semantic: same weak framing — tiebreaker shuffle only (rank formula promotes amenity-richest; all 4 still MOYEN)

details.actualOutcome: pipeline refreshed (3.9h → 1.7h), no rebalance — MQ scores cluster tightly at 69 across quality beaches
details.rootCauseNote: MQ unified-score ceiling this week is 69 not due to sargasses (46/53 clean) but because breakdown.cloud=0 for all beaches — ciel couvert penalizing everyone uniformly

riskIfShippedAsIs: MQ subject lead with MOYEN pejorative despite 46 clean beaches; GP subject strong and fine to ship unchanged
recommendedReview: Next session: decide whether to add score>=70 guard around score-based subject in email-weekend.cjs:234, falling back to clean-count framing otherwise. Requires feedback_no_code_before_ux review. Not auto-shipped.

source: live Apps Script funnel endpoint (?action=funnel), 28-day window

biggestDropOff.rationale: Of 182 users who see the modal, 154 (85%) dismiss without clicking CTA. This is the biggest addressable drop — CTA→payment already converts at 25% (healthy). Upstream session→lock (2.4%) is a landing-page gate where most visitors simply aren't shopping the premium gate at all; improving it requires broader UX redesign.

trackingGaps.issue: Funnel counters checkout_view (14) and checkout_submit (1) reference obsolete events. Current Sargasses_PROD.jsx emits sg_checkout_redirect only (line 3800) — the old inline-checkout events were removed in session 36 (f67e5b2). Counts are residual pre-session-36 data plus any stale recovery queue flushes. Effect: funnel understates CTA→checkout throughput and misses the true step where intent leaks.
trackingGaps.fixDirection: Replace checkout_view/submit keys with checkout_redirect in the Apps Script funnel handler and its rates block. Deploy via clasp per reference_apps_script_deploy. Low risk (data only).

trackingGaps.where: Apps Script funnel result session=0 despite code emitting sg_session_start
trackingGaps.issue: session:0 while ab_variants[lock1] totals 3621 suggests the Apps Script ISO cutoff string comparison on column 0 is filtering rows whose timestamp column is stored as Date rather than ISO string (date instanceof Date → toString() < cutoff always false-positive). Analytics_events may be written by GAS/sendBeacon with mixed types.
trackingGaps.fixDirection: In Code.js:565, coerce aData[i][0] to an ISO string before comparing (var ts = aData[i][0] instanceof Date ? aData[i][0].toISOString() : String(aData[i][0] || '')). Verify rate base shifts from zero to real sessions.

recommendation: Both tracking gaps are data-layer fixes (Apps Script only, no UX). Safe to ship without UX review per feedback_no_code_before_ux (no user-facing copy touched). Queued for next session: (1) rename funnel keys to checkout_redirect, (2) fix timestamp type coercion, (3) re-pull funnel to confirm session_to_lock rate becomes non-zero. Not auto-shipped because Apps Script deploy requires clasp push + DeploymentId rotation, which benefits from a batched ops session.

scope: data-layer only (Apps Script Code.js funnel handler). No client/UX changes.

bugsFixed.rootCause: funnel dict keyed 'session' but client emits sg_session_start → evt='session_start' after strip, never matched
client rewrite in session 36 (f67e5b2) changed events but Apps Script funnel dict wasn't updated

bugsFixed.before: if ((aData[i][0] || '') < cutoff) — Date obj coerces to locale string
bugsFixed.after: coerce to ISO first (var tsIso = cell instanceof Date ? cell.toISOString() : String(cell||''))
bugsFixed.rootCause: same pattern was already correct in the payments loop (line 593), funnel loop had been overlooked

newFindings.rationale: 14 of 28 premium_modal_cta clicks never fire sg_checkout_redirect. Masked before by zombie checkout_view counter. Likely beacon-during-navigation race (track() fires then window.location.assign preempts the beacon). Saved to memory project_funnel_cta_redirect_leak.md for next session investigation.
premium_modal_open fires from entrypoints other than forecast_lock_click (hero reco, daily reco, etc.). Not a bug — the funnel rate math needs reframing; lock→modal isn't a true stage.

Real baseline is half the previously-reported 2.4% (which used ab_variants as fake denominator). Lock gate converts 1% of all sessions, which is lean — but the big leaks downstream (cta→redirect) dwarf it as an addressable drop.

verification: node HTTPS GET to funnel endpoint (curl 411s on Apps Script), confirmed all 3 bugs fixed live on @38 URL (unchanged)
nextSession: Investigate cta_to_redirect leak: check if track('sg_premium_modal_cta') has a sendBeacon flush before window.location.assign in Sargasses_PROD.jsx:3798-3800. If not, that's the fix — but requires feedback_no_code_before_ux review since CTA handler is user-facing.

details.problem: Subject led with score+label even when <70 (MOYEN), burying abundance. Flagged 3x on 2026-04-17, deferred each time pending review; re-confirmed live 2026-06-13.
details.fix: Added STRONG_SCORE=70 guard. >=70 keeps score framing (BON/EXCELLENT); <70 with clean>0 uses abundance + named top pick; clean=0 falls back to best-pick / live-map.
